description.unified: Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in range and shackles them for [3.5 sec->6 sec].
Deals ??? M.DMG to enemies in a straight line and inflicts Blind for [3.5 sec->6 sec].
Each auto attack deals extra ??? M.DMG that ignores target's M.DEF.

dark.unified: Has a 25% chance of Blinding the enemy for [3 sec->5 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1000->1 orb] but DMG is boosted by 100%.

dark.unified: There is a 10% chance that Skill 1 is fired upon an auto-attack.

description.unified: [Shadow Wave] DMG is increased by 50% and Blind duration is increased by {0} sec.
Each attack has a {0}% chance of dealing {1}% of ATK as M.DMG, and all skill cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

Summons the soul of Tears of the Moon, Nerius, dealing ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies and inflicting them with [Curse of the Moon] for 10 sec. Targets inflicted with [Curse of the Moon] take [12%->25%] increased M.DMG and have their Heal Rate reduced by [12%->25%]. Afterward, increases own Crit DMG by [70%->50%].

1.to: Increases DMG by 50% and changes the M.DMG Boost effect to 45%.
1.unified: Increases DMG by 50% and changes the M.DMG Boost effect to [32%->45%].

2.from: For the duration of Skill, increases own ATK by 40%.
2.to: For the duration of Skill, Increases own ATK by 40%.
2.unified: For the duration of Skill, Increases own ATK by 40%.
